name: part_011
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-pro-preview/part_011.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performing the song 'Monopoly' on a stage with card and casino motifs.
Aki Rosenthal performing 'Katsushika Rhapsody' with other VTuber avatars appearing in bubbles.

subtitles.original: 魅惑の言葉の裏面に忍ばせた
subtitles.english: Hidden on the flip side of bewitching words,

subtitles.original: 1mgのスパイス
subtitles.english: 1mg of spice.

subtitles.original: たちまち華麗な指先で彩る
subtitles.english: Instantly colored by magnificent fingertips,

subtitles.original: 本日のダイス
subtitles.english: Today's dice.

subtitles.original: 当たり見て妥協してちゃ
subtitles.english: If you compromise after seeing the win,

subtitles.original: 生き残れないでしょう
subtitles.english: You won't be able to survive.

subtitles.original: 率直に言ってその全てが欲しい
subtitles.english: Frankly speaking, I want it all.

subtitles.original: 一人勝ちオールイン
subtitles.english: Sole winner, all-in.

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃってもいいじゃない
subtitles.english: Who cares what happens?

subtitles.original: 際限なんてないじゃない
subtitles.english: There are no limits, are there?

subtitles.original: 翻弄して翻弄されてゾクゾク
subtitles.english: Toying with you, being toyed with, it's thrilling.

subtitles.original: 食らっちゃっても本望でしょ
subtitles.english: Even if you take a hit, it's what you wanted.

subtitles.original: 最低だって滾るでしょ
subtitles.english: Even at the worst, it gets your blood boiling.

subtitles.original: 見透かして見透かされてイェーイ
subtitles.english: Seeing through, being seen through, yeah.

subtitles.original: 終わりはない
subtitles.english: There is no end.

subtitles.original: 高鳴るこの全てノンフィクション
subtitles.english: This throbbing heart is all nonfiction.

subtitles.original: 嗜むはずでも
subtitles.english: Even if I'm supposed to just dabble,

subtitles.original: たまには飲み過ぎて
subtitles.english: Sometimes I drink too much.

subtitles.original: 1回休み
subtitles.english: Miss a turn.

subtitles.original: 周りもそわつく
subtitles.english: Those around me get restless,

subtitles.original: 思わぬうたた寝で
subtitles.english: From an unexpected nap.

subtitles.original: 2回休み
subtitles.english: Miss two turns.

subtitles.original: 切れる頭と勘だけじゃ
subtitles.english: Just a sharp mind and intuition

subtitles.original: 手に入らないもの
subtitles.english: Aren't enough to get what I want.

subtitles.original: そこでいて見惚れるならいい
subtitles.english: Stay there if you're just going to admire.

subtitles.original: 命懸けで楽しむわ
subtitles.english: I'll enjoy this with my life on the line.

subtitles.original: Yeah yeah yeah
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah yeah

subtitles.original: 天地は案外近いのに
subtitles.english: Heaven and earth are surprisingly close,

subtitles.original: この距離 命乞い
subtitles.english: This distance, begging for life.

subtitles.original: たかがモノポリー されど道理
subtitles.english: It's just Monopoly, but it's the truth.

subtitles.original: 秘める想いで今宵も
subtitles.english: With hidden feelings, tonight too,

subtitles.original: 私は強い
subtitles.english: I am strong.

subtitles.original: どうなっちゃってもいいじゃない
subtitles.english: Who cares what happens?

subtitles.original: 際限なんてないじゃない
subtitles.english: There are no limits, are there?

subtitles.original: 翻弄して翻弄されてゾクゾク
subtitles.english: Toying with you, being toyed with, it's thrilling.

subtitles.original: 食らっちゃっても本望でしょ
subtitles.english: Even if you take a hit, it's what you wanted.

subtitles.original: 最低だって滾るでしょ
subtitles.english: Even at the worst, it gets your blood boiling.

subtitles.original: 見透かして見透かされてイェーイ
subtitles.english: Seeing through, being seen through, yeah.

subtitles.original: 終わりはない
subtitles.english: There is no end.

subtitles.original: 高鳴るこの全てノンフィクション
subtitles.english: This throbbing heart is all nonfiction.

subtitles.original: 落ちても昇ってもノンフィクション
subtitles.english: Falling or rising, it's nonfiction.

subtitles.original: 中川に浮かぶ 夕日をめがけて
subtitles.english: Aiming for the setting sun floating on the Nakagawa,

subtitles.original: 小石を蹴ったら 靴まで飛んで
subtitles.english: When I kicked a pebble, my shoe flew off too,

subtitles.original: ジョギングしていた 大工の頭に
subtitles.english: Hitting the head of a carpenter who was jogging,

subtitles.original: ガキのまんまだと 笑われたのさ
subtitles.english: He laughed and said I'm still a brat.

subtitles.original: どこかに元気を 落っことしても
subtitles.english: Even if I drop my energy somewhere,

subtitles.original: 葛飾亀有 アクビをひとつ
subtitles.english: Katsushika Kameari, let out a yawn.

subtitles.original: 変わらない町並みが 妙に優しいよ
subtitles.english: The unchanging townscape is strangely kind.

subtitles.original: 中央広場で 子供の手を引く
subtitles.english: Leading a child by the hand in the central square,

subtitles.original: 太ったあの子は 初恋の人
subtitles.english: That chubby girl is my first love.

subtitles.original: ゴンパチ池で 渡したラブレター
subtitles.english: The love letter I gave her at Gonpachi Pond,

subtitles.original: 今も持てると からかわれたよ
subtitles.english: She teased me saying she still has it.

subtitles.original: 何もいいこと なかったけど
subtitles.english: Nothing good really happened, but...

subtitles.original: 葛飾水元 流れる雲と
subtitles.english: Katsushika Mizumoto, with the flowing clouds.

subtitles.original: ラプソディー口ずさみ 少し歩こうか
subtitles.english: Shall we walk a bit while humming a rhapsody?

subtitles.original: カラスが鳴くから もう日が暮れるね
subtitles.english: The crows are cawing, so the sun is setting.

subtitles.original: 焼き鳥ほおばり ビール飲もうか
subtitles.english: Let's stuff ourselves with yakitori and drink beer.

subtitles.original: とんがり帽子の 取水塔から
subtitles.english: From the pointy-hat water intake tower,

subtitles.original: 帝釈天へと 夕日が落ちる
subtitles.english: The sun sets towards Taishakuten.
